name: mega
description: MEGA Hub plugin for Codex with focused workflow skills and the official HF-aligned MEGA MCP v1.1 server.

interface.shortDescription: MEGA Hub workflows with official MCP and CLI guidance
interface.longDescription: Use MEGA Hub from Codex with focused skills for repositories, datasets, Spaces, Jobs, Sandboxes, inference, and community workflows. The official OAuth MCP v1.1 server exposes 29 HF-aligned tools plus resources and prompts for bounded live operations; skills route local files, bulk transfer, streaming, Git, secrets, unsupported mutations, and automation to the mega CLI.
defaultPrompt: Help me choose the safest MEGA workflow, using MCP for live API access and the mega CLI for local, bulk, or streaming work
